response.justification: Bogdan possesses an exceptional and extensive background as a Staff/Senior Software Developer with decades of experience, demonstrating proficiency in all required technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs, relational databases) and strong alignment with nice-to-have qualifications like AI agent infrastructure, AWS, and Kubernetes. While technically outstanding and aligned with the industry, his vast experience significantly exceeds the 'Junior / Mid-Level' and 'first to several years' requirements for this role, indicating a substantial overqualification that would likely lead to a mismatch in seniority, responsibilities, and salary expectations.
strengths: Comprehensive full-stack development experience across various technologies.
Strong proficiency in all required skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST, SQL).
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure, AWS, and Kubernetes (nice-to-haves).
concerns: Significantly overqualified for a 'Junior / Mid-Level' position with decades of experience.
Experience level (Staff/Senior) far exceeds the 'first to several years' requirement.
Potential mismatch in salary expectations and career growth trajectory for the role.
